source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage / Crane / Other Lifting

context.region: Gulf of Mexico - Garden Banks Block 1003

actions_taken: Injured party treated by Rig Medic
Helicopter evacuation to Terrebonne Medical Center
BSEE Lafayette District notified at 1117 hours on 18 September 2020
event.summary: On 18 September 2020 at 0640 hours, a third-party contracted Floorhand employed by Prime Ocean sustained a fractured fibula to his left ankle when his foot slipped into a 4.5-inch HydraRacker track gap while removing bushings from 5-inch drill pipe elevator inserts on the Pacific Drilling Khamsin drillship. The worker lost balance and fell, striking his ankle on the HydraRacker track. He was evacuated by helicopter and required surgery.

hazards.name: Elevated work near moving/fixed equipment with gap hazards
Manual handling of heavy drill pipe elevator inserts

threats.name: Worker foot entrapment in HydraRacker track gap
Loss of balance during manual lifting operation
Slip/trip on rig floor during elevator insert removal

controls.name: Job Planning and Work Area Selection
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to prevent work in hazardous proximity to HydraRacker tracks
controls.lod_basis: Planning should identify safer work locations away from track gaps

supporting_text: work operations were conducted near the HydraRacker tracks instead of working in a safer area
inadequate job planning since operations to change out the elevator inserts were in close proximity to the HydraRacker tracks

controls.name: Task Risk Assessment
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to identify and communicate slip/trip/fall hazards specific to the task
controls.lod_basis: TRA should specifically address hazards of working near HydraRacker tracks

supporting_text: slip/trip/fall hazards of working near the HydraRacker tracks were not specifically / individually addressed in the Task Risk Assessment

controls.name: Supervision and Hazard Communication
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to identify, evaluate and communicate risks to workers
controls.lod_basis: Supervision responsibility to communicate hazards before work begins

supporting_text: supervision failed to identify, evaluate and communicate the risks of changing the elevator inserts near the HydraRacker tracks
Prior to the job task, supervision did not identify the hazards of working by the HyraRacker tracks

controls.name: Worker Situational Awareness and Hazard Recognition
controls.barrier_role: Administrative/behavioral control to recognize and avoid hazards during task execution
controls.lod_basis: Worker awareness of track gap hazard during manual lifting operation

supporting_text: failure to recognize the potential hazards of manually changing out elevator inserts near the HydraRacker tracks
lack of situational awareness of the risks involved when working near the HydraRacker tracks

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
